about: David Sawicki is a software engineer, linguist, and music director based in New York City. He is currently employed as a Senior Software Engineer at Duolingo, where he manages the Text-to-Speech (TTS) infrastructure and applications. He received his bachelor's and master's degrees in Linguistics in 2012 from Harvard University (magna cum laude with highest honors in field). As a linguist, his research interests lie at the intersection of cognition and phonology. David is also a conductor, pianist, music director and copyist for musical theater and opera. He served as the Assistant Conductor and Keyboard 2 for the 2016-17 Broadway Revival of CATS. He has also worked on the Broadway productions of Phantom of the Opera (2018-23) and Sunset Boulevard (2017). He has performed in over 50 US cities with touring Broadway musicals, such as Evita (2013-14; Associate Conductor & Keyboard 2), Love Never Dies, and CATS. He has conducted in venues such as the Pantages Theatre in Los Angeles, CA and the Kennedy Center Opera House in Washington, DC.… more

experience.description: Music copyist, substitute musician for keyboards 1 & 2, and music assistant at Phantom of the Opera on Broadway for the final 5 years of the original Broadway production

Principal software engineer (Java, Python and Node.js) building NLP solutions for our customers in the financial technology sector. My responsibilities included: • Designing robust Natural Language Understanding with machine learning for intent classification and slot extraction in English, French, Chinese and Indonesian • Creating context-sensitive text normalization to enrich the user experience • Generating training and testing data while creating pipelines for testing and automation • Building backend integrations with customer APIs and business logic • Training and bootstrapping language models and acoustic models • Improving cross-linguistic Natural Language Generation modules • Manage internationalization and localization projects across languages, countries and customers • Creating and enforcing coding standards, best practices, unit testing and code reviews… more

I conducted and played keyboards for the Broadway revival of CATS, which opened at the Neil Simon Theatre on July 31st, 2016. • Assistant Conductor & Keyboard 2 (January 2017 - December 2017) • Keyboard Swing [Keyboard 2 & 3] & Rehearsal Pianist (July 2016 - January 2017) • Music Assistant (May 2016 - July 2016)… more
Assistant to Kristen Blodgette (Music Director) for the 2017 revival of Sunset Boulevard on Broadway
